name: Valor Futuro de Anualidad
description: Calcula el valor futuro de una serie de pagos iguales.
seo_description: Calcula el valor futuro de una serie de pagos iguales. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Con explicacion de estadisticas.
example_label: Calculating future value of $500 annual payments at 6% interest over 20 years.
result_context: The fv of {fv} is the accumulated value of all payments plus compound interest.
mistakes: Using ordinary annuity fórmula when payments are at beginning (annuity due)
Not matching payment frequency with interest rate period
Forgetting that inflation reduces real future value
